creator: gerard.amailland@jouy.inra.fr
text:
Hello
I can not compile libreoffice 3-5.2.2 

cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
make install clean
configure: error: --with-system-cppunit conflicts with DBG_UTIL build

Please read the shar file : install-libreoffice.txt

Fix: I have no problem to compile with freebsd 8.2 libreoffice 3-5.2.2
I have reinstalled 3.4.5 on freebsd 9.0 libreoffice


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: all the time
